title: Warning Signs For The AI Boom, Anthropic Passes OpenAI, Robinhood’s AI Trading
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy discuss warning signs in the AI boom, including exploding token consumption and companies reconsidering AI spend. They debate whether token spending on shipping products is insufficient at 18 percent and examine circular investment dynamics and memory chip demand. The episode covers Anthropic surpassing OpenAI in valuation, Robinhood's AI trading features, and privacy and ethics concerns around AI services.
